files./tsconfig.json:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "moduleResolution": "Bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "strict": true
  },
  "include": ["App.tsx", "index.tsx", "journeyAnalytics.ts", "touring.ts", "wmill.d.ts"]
}
